scripts.build: command -v cmake >/dev/null 2>&1 && make build || echo 'Skipping Pico build (cmake not found)'
scripts.build:all: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && IOTKIT_BOARD=pico_w make build && cp build/devicesdk-client.uf2 dist/devicesdk-pico-w-client.uf2 && IOTKIT_BOARD=pico2_w make build && cp build/devicesdk-client.uf2 dist/devicesdk-pico2-w-client.uf2
scripts.publish: pnpm build:all && wrangler r2 object put devicesdk-firmwares/devicesdk-pico-w-client.uf2 --file dist/devicesdk-pico-w-client.uf2 --remote && wrangler r2 object put devicesdk-firmwares/devicesdk-pico2-w-client.uf2 --file dist/devicesdk-pico2-w-client.uf2 --remote
scripts.test: command -v cmake >/dev/null 2>&1 && (cd test && cmake -B build && cmake --build build && ./build/run_tests) || echo 'Skipping Pico host tests (cmake not found)'
